description:
Ruff now handles both formatting and import sorting, replacing both black and isort. Much faster (Rust-based). Already in the linter set.

Affected file: `home-modules/editors/neovim/lsp/languages.nix` lines 76-79.

Change `type = [ "black" "isort" ]` to `type = [ "ruff" ]`.
title: Replace black+isort with ruff for Python formatting
